AR1.justification: Nothing was misrouted — decisions/observations/followups correctly left untouched while the procedure is mid-flight — but no daybook entry was written for a session that did substantive (if minimal) work, so the catch-all chronological surface is silent on the run.

AR2.justification: Step 1 produced the named timeline.md artifact with the four mandated empty headers, and step 2 stalled visibly at the operator-interview boundary, enumerating the missing inputs (detection signal, diagnosis, rollback time, deploy ID) rather than inventing them.

AR3.justification: Only one filesystem reference exists (the timeline.md path under the dated slug folder); it is relative, ISO-anchored, and resolves. No broken or absolute cross-references were introduced.

AR4.justification: Single `mkdir -p` plus first-time file write — fully idempotent; a future session resuming at step 2 would find the placeholder timeline in place and continue cleanly without any conflicting state.
